hero.subtitle: Simurg Financial Consulting Inc. provides integrated financial, legal and strategic advisory solutions to guide your company through growth, transformation and corporate development.

home.whoQuote: The power you seek is not outside, but within the potential discovered through the right strategy.
home.whoQuoteSub: Every transformation begins with the right analysis. Every success grows with the discovery of potential.
home.groupTitle: An integrated ecosystem under one roof
home.servicesSubtitle: We address your financial, fiscal, legal and strategic needs with a holistic, complementary approach.
home.servicesCardText: Let's talk about a tailored solution.
home.whyTitle: The right partnership for sustainable success
home.whySubtitle: Because sustainable success begins with the right analysis and a strong companion.
home.processTitle: A measurable, transparent and manageable system
home.refTitle: Experiences from projects we run with a confidentiality principle
home.refSubtitle: We value the confidentiality of the institutions we work with; we share our experiences by sector and service scope.
home.blogTitle: Current incentives, tax agenda and financial guides
home.blogText: We share up-to-date information and expert content relevant to your company in our blog section.

footer.tagline: An integrated solution partner uniting financial, legal and strategic advisory under one roof.

pages.storyDesc: True power lies not in an external savior sought outside, but in the journey itself and the inner potential discovered along the way.
pages.valleys: The Seven Valleys of the Journey
pages.mvDesc: An advisory approach inspired by the Simurg legend, turning potential into strategy.
pages.referencesNote: Actual reference logos and detailed success stories will be added in due course, subject to our business partners' approval.
pages.aboutDesc: Simurg is an integrated solution partner uniting financial, fiscal, legal and strategic advisory under one roof.
pages.linkStoryDesc: The journey of thirty birds and our philosophy
pages.consultantsDesc: Our team is experienced in strategic management, financial advisory and international business development.
pages.consultantsPhotoNote: Profile photos will be added before launch.
pages.groupNote: By bringing together fiscal operations, financial advisory, production, trade and export experience under one roof, this structure makes Simurg an integrated solution partner that applies in the field rather than a purely theoretical advisory firm.
pages.careerDesc: In line with our growing structure, we aim to work with teammates in various areas of expertise in the coming periods.
pages.careerIntro: We currently have no active open positions. Candidates wishing to make a general application can share their resumes with us; we will consider them when a suitable position arises.
pages.careerFormSub: Leave your details and we'll keep them on file.
pages.contactDesc: The first meeting is free. Let us listen to your needs and create a roadmap tailored to your business.
pages.contactFormSub: Fill out the form and we'll get back to you shortly.
